University of California
Computer ScienceMasters
May 27, 2026
Accepted on May 27
Total comments
Accepted on May 27
Fall 2026
American

For the MSCS (Scientists and Engineers track, for non cs majors). Kinda surprised since I have a philosophy BA and pretty minimal ECs and anything relevant really. My Letters were good tho, I know that. Also my SoP made some pretty sophisticated links to modern machine learning, not just the surface level "ethics... blah blah". Seems like the cohort is massive, but considering my background I am content.
